nasb.text: It is to be a sabbath of solemn rest for you, that you may humble your souls; it is a permanent statute.

esv.text: It is a Sabbath of solemn rest to you, and you shall afflict yourselves; it is a statute forever.

cnv.text: 這是完全休歇的安息，你們要刻苦己心。這是永遠的律例。

ccb.text: 这天是你们的安息日，你们要禁食。这是一条永远不变的律例。
